context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+
+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped
+
+from infrastructure.db.session import create_engine
+
+
+@dataclass
+class Review:
+    id: str
+    summary: str
+
+    def save(self):
+        engine = create_engine("postgresql+asyncpg://localhost/app")
+        engine.execute("INSERT INTO reviews VALUES (...)")

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+
+from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped
+
+from infrastructure.db.session import create_engine
+
+
+@dataclass
+class Review:
+    id: str
+    summary: str
+
+    def save(self):
+        engine = create_engine("postgresql+asyncpg://localhost/app")
+        engine.execute("INSERT INTO reviews VALUES (...)")

expected_findings.title: Domain entity imports framework and infrastructure
expected_findings.rationale: A domain entity imports SQLAlchemy and the infrastructure DB session, violating the dependency rule that domain has zero framework/infrastructure imports.

expected_findings.title: Entity performs its own persistence (active record)
expected_findings.rationale: The entity opens a DB engine and executes SQL inside save(); persistence is an infrastructure concern that belongs in a repository, not on the domain entity.
